title: Amazing Arts Game Zone
source: Generated from approved unit runtime and linked master dictionary

games.title: Meaning Match
games.description: Match each unit word to its approved child-friendly meaning.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: The process of cutting down or removing trees from a forest or area of land.
rounds.answer: deforestation
rounds.explanation: deforestation: The process of cutting down or removing trees from a forest or area of land.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: Giving up something important or valuable for the sake of something else.
rounds.answer: sacrifice
rounds.explanation: sacrifice: Giving up something important or valuable for the sake of something else.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: A student who is in the same class as you at school.
rounds.answer: classmate
rounds.explanation: classmate: A student who is in the same class as you at school.

games.title: Spelling Builder
games.description: Choose letter tiles to build important unit words.

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: The height of something above sea level or ground level.
rounds.answer: altitude

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: Doing very well and growing strong or healthy.
rounds.answer: thriving

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: To hit something with a lot of force; to come into conflict.
rounds.answer: collide

games.title: Sentence Puzzle
games.description: Put unit words into the correct sentence order.

rounds.prompt: Build the complete model sentence.
rounds.answer: The landscape was beautiful, with tall mountains and green fields.

rounds.prompt: Build the complete model sentence.
rounds.answer: I love to drink peppermint tea when I feel cold.

rounds.prompt: Build the complete model sentence.
rounds.answer: The flowers flourished in the warm sunshine after the rain.

games.title: Language Choice
games.description: Choose the form that makes the unit language accurate.

rounds.prompt: Choose the missing word from 'The Children of Wind Valley, part 1': Now it's close to the _____." Adam nodded.
rounds.answer: subtropics
rounds.explanation: The text says: Now it's close to the subtropics." Adam nodded.

rounds.prompt: Choose the missing word from 'The Children of Wind Valley, part 1': And the _____ plants are gone." They sat on a rock overlooking the valley.
rounds.answer: peppermint
rounds.explanation: The text says: And the peppermint plants are gone." They sat on a rock overlooking the valley.

rounds.prompt: Choose the missing word from 'The Children of Wind Valley, part 1': Nature is not just space — it's memory." They visited a local farm with a wind _____.
rounds.answer: turbine
rounds.explanation: The text says: Nature is not just space — it's memory." They visited a local farm with a wind turbine.

games.title: Speaking Quest
games.description: Listen, record, review and submit useful unit language.

rounds.prompt: Speaking 1: Vocabulary Expert Interview
rounds.target: The landscape was beautiful, with tall mountains and green fields.

rounds.prompt: Speaking 3: Four-Minute Unit Talk
rounds.target: I love to drink peppermint tea when I feel cold.

rounds.prompt: Speaking 5: Explain and Respond
rounds.target: Explain one important unit idea, give a reason with because, and respond to two follow-up questions.

games.title: Word Order Race
games.description: Arrange unit language in a clear, accurate order.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: My classmate helped me with my homework when I was absent.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: The caterpillar will transform into a beautiful butterfly.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: The spacecraft took astronauts to the International Space Station.

games.title: Definition Dash
games.description: Choose the approved meaning before moving to the next clue.

rounds.prompt: What does 'thriving' mean in this unit?
choices: Doing very well and growing strong or healthy.
The process of cutting down or removing trees from a forest or area of land.
The height of something above sea level or ground level.
rounds.answer: Doing very well and growing strong or healthy.
rounds.explanation: thriving: Doing very well and growing strong or healthy.

rounds.prompt: What does 'transform' mean in this unit?
choices: The process of cutting down or removing trees from a forest or area of land.
The height of something above sea level or ground level.
To change something into a different form or appearance.
rounds.answer: To change something into a different form or appearance.
rounds.explanation: transform: To change something into a different form or appearance.

rounds.prompt: What does 'altitude' mean in this unit?
choices: A type of plant with a strong, fresh smell and taste, often used in teas and sweets.

rounds.answer: The height of something above sea level or ground level.

rounds.answer: Noun

rounds.answer: Noun

games.title: Memory Pairs
games.description: Reveal tiles and connect each word with its meaning.

rounds.prompt: Match vocabulary set 1.
pairs: The height of something above sea level or ground level.
A machine that uses the movement of air or water to create energy or power.
To keep something in its original state or condition so it is not damaged or spoiled.

rounds.prompt: Match vocabulary set 2.
pairs: Doing very well and growing strong or healthy.
A feeling of shame or loss of respect because of something bad that has happened.

rounds.prompt: Match vocabulary set 3.
pairs: To hit something with a lot of force; to come into conflict.
Something that is complete and not limited in any way.
A vehicle that is designed to travel in outer space.

games.title: Question Quest
games.description: Read each unit question carefully and choose the best answer.

rounds.prompt: What does 'subtropics' mean?
choices: A machine that uses the movement of air or water to create energy or power.
The act of working to make a change in society or to help a cause.
The area of land just below the tropics, where the weather is warm and sometimes dry.
To make changes to something in order to improve it.
rounds.answer: The area of land just below the tropics, where the weather is warm and sometimes dry.
rounds.explanation: Many plants that grow in the subtropics need lots of sunshine and warm temperatures.

rounds.prompt: Choose the missing word from 'The Children of Wind Valley, part 1': It was called _____ — and it had changed everything.
rounds.answer: deforestation
rounds.explanation: The text says: It was called deforestation — and it had changed everything.

rounds.prompt: Choose the missing word from 'Amazing Arts: source text 2': The mural showed a _____ of green hills, a bright sun, and children planting trees together.
rounds.answer: landscape
rounds.explanation: The text says: The mural showed a landscape of green hills, a bright sun, and children planting trees together.

games.title: Unit Mission
games.description: Finish with a mixed challenge across the whole unit.

rounds.prompt: What does 'deforestation' mean?
choices: A type of plant with a strong, fresh smell and taste, often used in teas and sweets.
The area of land just below the tropics, where the weather is warm and sometimes dry.
The height of something above sea level or ground level.
The process of cutting down or removing trees from a forest or area of land.
rounds.answer: The process of cutting down or removing trees from a forest or area of land.
rounds.explanation: Deforestation can harm animals that live in the trees and cause floods.

rounds.prompt: What does 'landscape' mean?
choices: A machine that uses the movement of air or water to create energy or power.
A type of plant with a strong, fresh smell and taste, often used in teas and sweets.
The area of land just below the tropics, where the weather is warm and sometimes dry.
The visible features of an area of land, including mountains, trees, and water.
rounds.answer: The visible features of an area of land, including mountains, trees, and water.
rounds.explanation: The landscape was beautiful, with tall mountains and green fields.

rounds.prompt: What does 'altitude' mean?
choices: A machine that uses the movement of air or water to create energy or power.
A type of plant with a strong, fresh smell and taste, often used in teas and sweets.
The height of something above sea level or ground level.
To make changes to something in order to improve it.
rounds.answer: The height of something above sea level or ground level.
rounds.explanation: The airplane flew at a high altitude, far above the clouds.
